title: Illegal Craftings [Forge]
description: This mod makes some uncraftable items craftable, but in a fair way!
body:
# Illegal Craftings
[![avalible for fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/illegal-craftings-fabric)

Illegal Craftings **allows you to craft things you can't normally craft!**

## Recipes
You need to look them up in the Just Enough Items menu.

Here is all the items that can be crafted with this mod.


<details>
<summary>See them...</summary>


- Bedrock
- Barrier
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Player Head
- Dragon Head
- Zombie Head
- Wither Head
- Skeleton Head
- Oak Leaves
- Grass Path
- Name Tag
- Netherrack
- Mycelium
- Creeper Head
- C418 Music Disc 13
- C418 Music Disc Strad
- C418 Music Disc Cat
- C418 Music Disc Blocks
- C418 Music Disc Mellohi
- C418 Music Disc Stal
- C418 Music Disc Far
- C418 Music Disc Chirp
- C418 Music Disc Warp
- C418 Music Disc Blocks
- C418 Music Disc Mall
- Chainmail Helmet
- Chainmail Chestplate
- Chainmail Leggings
- Chainmail Boots
- Ender Pearl
- Dead Bush (Smelting)
- Obsidian
- Grass Block
- Saddle
- Leather Horse Armor
- Gold House Armor
- Diamond Horse Armor

</details>
